prompt: Tool available: get_weather(city: string). Respond with ONLY a JSON object of the form {"name": ..., "arguments": {...}} that gets the current weather for Paris.
Tool available: get_stock_price(ticker: string). Respond with ONLY a JSON object {"name": ..., "arguments": {...}} to look up the price of Apple stock (ticker AAPL).
Tool available: send_email(to: string, subject: string). Respond with ONLY a JSON object {"name": ..., "arguments": {...}} to email alice@example.com with the subject Hello.
Tool available: convert_currency(amount: number, from: string, to: string). Respond with ONLY a JSON object {"name": ..., "arguments": {...}} to convert 100 USD to EUR.
Tool available: set_timer(minutes: number). Respond with ONLY a JSON object {"name": ..., "arguments": {...}} to set a timer for 10 minutes.
Tool available: search_web(query: string). Respond with ONLY a JSON object {"name": ..., "arguments": {...}} to search the web for best pizza in Rome.
Tool available: play_song(title: string, artist: string). Respond with ONLY a JSON object {"name": ..., "arguments": {...}} to play Imagine by John Lennon.
Tool available: book_flight(origin: string, destination: string). Respond with ONLY a JSON object {"name": ..., "arguments": {...}} to book a flight from JFK to LHR.
Tool available: translate(text: string, target: string). Respond with ONLY a JSON object {"name": ..., "arguments": {...}} to translate 'hello' into Spanish.
Tool available: add_event(title: string, date: string). Respond with ONLY a JSON object {"name": ..., "arguments": {...}} to add a calendar event titled Standup on 2026-07-01.
Tool available: get_distance(from: string, to: string). Respond with ONLY a JSON object {"name": ..., "arguments": {...}} to get the driving distance from Boston to New York.
Tool available: create_user(username: string, admin: boolean). Respond with ONLY a JSON object {"name": ..., "arguments": {...}} to create a non-admin user named bob.
